instruction: The smiley has an extra eyebrow-like stroke above one eye. Clean it off.
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <circle id="face" fill="#fde047" stroke="#222" stroke-width="2" cx="64" cy="64" r="48" />
  <circle id="eye-left" fill="#222" cx="50" cy="54" r="4" />
  <circle id="eye-right" fill="#222" cx="78" cy="54" r="4" />
  <circle id="nose" fill="#222" cx="64" cy="64" r="2" />
  <polyline id="mouth" fill="none" stroke="#222" stroke-width="2" points="50,78 64,86 78,78" />
  <ellipse id="blush-left" fill="#fda4af" cx="38" cy="70" rx="5" ry="3" />
  <ellipse id="blush-right" fill="#fda4af" cx="90" cy="70" rx="5" ry="3" />
  <line id="extra-brow" stroke="#222" stroke-width="2" x1="43" y1="42" x2="58" y2="39" />
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <circle id="face" fill="#fde047" stroke="#222" stroke-width="2" cx="64" cy="64" r="48" />
  <circle id="eye-left" fill="#222" cx="50" cy="54" r="4" />
  <circle id="eye-right" fill="#222" cx="78" cy="54" r="4" />
  <circle id="nose" fill="#222" cx="64" cy="64" r="2" />
  <polyline id="mouth" fill="none" stroke="#222" stroke-width="2" points="50,78 64,86 78,78" />
  <ellipse id="blush-left" fill="#fda4af" cx="38" cy="70" rx="5" ry="3" />
  <ellipse id="blush-right" fill="#fda4af" cx="90" cy="70" rx="5" ry="3" />
</svg>
